caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey and white baseball cap with a red and black logo, and black over-ear headphones sits in a recording studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone mounted on a shock mount with a black arm. The background consists of dark grey acoustic foam panels. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking into the microphone. In the beginning, he is looking forward with a neutral expression. As the clip progresses, he shifts his gaze slightly downward and closes his eyes briefly while continuing to speak, eventually returning to a more open expression. The microphone arm features the text "BomeMic Studio-X". The man's right arm, showing a tattoo on his shoulder, is visible as he remains seated in a stationary position throughout the recording session.
